CASE REFERRED FOR SETTLEMENT NEGOTIATIONS. DEPARTMENT 514. JUDGE: THOMAS J. MELLON, JR.; CLERK: VICKI MACK; REPORTER: LESLIE SETTE. AFTER EXTENSIVE DISCUSSIONS AMONG THE PARTIES AND THE COURT, THE PARTIES ARRIVE AT ASETTLEMENT. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFFS GERBER AND KARLA GONZALEZ, WITH COUNSEL PHILIP O'BRIEN AND THOMAS PAOLI; DEFENDANT JOSEPH BRAND WITH COUNSEL, DANIEL BORNSTEIN (SPECIALLY APPEARING), AND WILLIAM W. HASKELL. MICHAEL A. BARNES OF ALLSTATE IS ALSO PRESENT. PURSUANT TO AN EX PARTE APPLICATION, PLAINTIFF GERBER GONZALEZ IS APPOINTED GUARDIAN AD LITEM FOR THE MINOR JASON GONZALEZ. THE CASE IS SETTLED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS SHALL BE PAID $50,000.00 ($5,000.00 FROM DEFENDANTS BRAND AND $45,000.00 FROM ALLSTATE.) THE PARTIES AGREE TO MUTUAL RELEASES OF CLAIMS. THE SETTLEMENT IS CONTINGENT UPON THE GRANTING OF THE COMPROMISE OF THE CLAIM OF THE MINOR, JASON GONZALEZ. THE COURT RETAINS JURISDICTION HERETO.

calendar.matters:
Petition To Approve Compromise Of Claim (Minor)
Off Calendar Apr-28-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: The cause came on regularly for petition to approve minor's compromise before Judge Thomas J. Mellon, Jr. in Dept. 514 by noticed motion. Clerk: V. Mack, Reporter: JoAnn Bryce #3321
Appearances:
Philip O'Brien, Esq., for claimant Jason Gonzalez, a minor, by and through his guardian ad litem, Gerber Gonzalez, the claimant's father are present. Karla Gonzalez, the claimant's mother, is also present.
The compromise is approved as follows:
$4,499.00 is to be deposited into a Bank of America account located at the 23rd and Mission branch until the minor reaches the age of 18. Counsel is to prepare the order.

JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Feb-04-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Case referred for settlement negotiations. Department 514. Judge: Thomas J. Mellon, Jr.; Clerk: Vicki Mack; Reporter: Leslie Sette. After extensive discussions among the parties and the court, the parties arrive at asettlement. APPEARANCES: Plaintiffs Gerber and Karla Gonzalez, with counsel Philip O'Brien and Thomas Paoli; defendant Joseph Brand with counsel, Daniel Bornstein (specially appearing), and William W. Haskell. Michael A. Barnes of Allstate is also present. Pursuant to an ex parte application, plaintiff GERBER GONZALEZ is appointed guardian ad litem for the minor JASON GONZALEZ. The case is settled as follows: Plaintiffs shall be paid $50,000.00 ($5,000.00 from defendants Brand and $45,000.00 from Allstate.) The parties agree to mutual releases of claims. The settlement is contingent upon the granting of the compromise of the claim of the minor, Jason Gonzalez. The court retains jurisdiction hereto.
